BYD is launching Song Ultra EV on 26th & deliveries will start right away. All customers will get 1 yr of free lightning charging.

BYD is taking this opportunity to advertise the amount of money customers would save from 1 yr of Tang/Han L as well as Seal 07 & Sea Lion 06 EV. https://t.co/c271F3v7N0

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Alibaba also announced partnership w/ BOSC's Xiangshan family. Both develop high performance RISC-V cores for HPC mkt.

According to a speaker, RISC-V already has 25% of global processor mkt. More powerful core designs from T-Head & BOSC will only increase its adoption. https://t.co/JEPXmSE5vE
